opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These rough, ugly lumps are spreading all over my fingers, and they hurt every time I try to type or hold a pen. I'm really scared it might be something serious like skin cancer.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started as one little lump about three months ago and now there are lots of them on both hands, some right next to my nails. They've spread so fast and they're so painful and horrible-looking that I panicked and needed someone to check them today.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 months ago, started as a single small rough lump on one finger
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 months, but it has spread to lots of lumps across both hands over that time
symptom_narrative.character: rough, hard, raised, dome-shaped lumps with a horny, cauliflower-like surface; some have tiny black dots in them that look like little splinters
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the lumps near my nails really hurt when I press on them, type or hold a pen; the appearance upsets me the most
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the backs and sides of the fingers on both hands, several right up against the nails
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: slowly spreading over three months; painful whenever the ones near the nails are knocked or pressed
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; they were painless at first
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: pressing on them, typing, holding a pen; they seem to spread when I pick at them
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the normal skin lines look disrupted where the lumps are
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: hard to type or hold a pen because the ones near my nails are painful; I keep my hands hidden because I'm embarrassed

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious about the appearance and about the lumps being contagious; has been trying to pick and dig at them with tweezers to get rid of them

objective_data_offered.value: several rough, raised, dome-shaped lumps with a horny cauliflower-like surface on the backs and sides of the fingers of both hands, a few right next to the nails; the biggest is on my right index finger and is maybe the size of a small pea; you can see tiny black dots inside some of them and the normal skin lines are broken up over the lumps
the lumps are not bleeding, not black or brown coloured, and the skin around them is not red, hot or swollen

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer
